_meta.how_to_review: Open this file and walk the candidates list. For each proposed_claim, set reviewer_status to "approved" or "rejected"; tighten text, category, question_idx, sources if needed. Future apply-claims.py will pick up reviewer_status="approved" items and merge them into scorecard.json under each candidate's claims[] array with verified_date=today and confidence copied forward. Items you do not touch stay pending; they are re-proposed on the next run.
